constructors.name: GumballAppearanceSettings
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the GumballAppearanceSettings class

properties.name: ArcThickness
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: ArrowHeadLength
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: ArrowHeadWidth
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: AxisThickness
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: ColorX
properties.summary: Default is Red.

properties.name: ColorY
properties.summary: Default is Green.

properties.name: ColorZ
properties.summary: Default is Blue.

properties.name: FreeTranslate
properties.summary: When FreeTranslate is 1, the center translation control can be dragged in any direction and moves the object the gumball controls. When FreeTranslate is 2, the center translation control can be dragged in any direction and moves the object the gumball itself. The default value is 2.

properties.name: MenuDistance
properties.summary: Distance of menu ball from center.

properties.name: MenuEnabled
properties.summary: When MenuEnabled is true, the menu "button" is drawn on the gumball. The default setting is true.

properties.name: MenuSize
properties.summary: Radius of menu circle.

properties.name: PlanarTranslationGripCorner
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: PlanarTranslationGripSize
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: Radius
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: RelocateEnabled
properties.summary: When RelocateEnabled is true, the user can reposition the gumball by tapping the control key while dragging. Once the repostion drag is terminated by releasing the/ mouse button, ordinary editing resumes. The default setting is true.

properties.name: RotateXEnabled
properties.summary: When RotateX is true, the X rotation control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: RotateYEnabled
properties.summary: When RotateY is true, the Y rotation control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: RotateZEnabled
properties.summary: When RotateZ is true, the Z rotation control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: ScaleGripSize
properties.summary: in pixels.

properties.name: ScaleXEnabled
properties.summary: When ScaleXEnabled is true, the X scale control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: ScaleYEnabled
properties.summary: When ScaleYEnabled is true, the Y scale control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: ScaleZEnabled
properties.summary: When ScaleZEnabled is true, the Z scale control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: TranslateXEnabled
properties.summary: TranslateXEnabled is true, the X axis translation control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: TranslateXYEnabled
properties.summary: When TranslateXY is true, the XY plane translation control is available in appropriate views. The default setting is true.

properties.name: TranslateYEnabled
properties.summary: TranslateYEnabled is true, the Y axis translation control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: TranslateYZEnabled
properties.summary: When TranslateYZ is true, the YZ plane translation control is available in appropriate views. The default setting is true.

properties.name: TranslateZEnabled
properties.summary: TranslateZEnabled is true, the Z axis translation control is available. The default setting is true.

properties.name: TranslateZXEnabled
properties.summary: When TranslateZX is true, the ZX plane translation control is available in appropriate views. The default setting is true.
